title: zosima lasiocarpa
intro: Zosima lasiocarpa, also known as the woolly sea lavender, is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae, native to the coastal areas of the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Zosima lasiocarpa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Zosima lasiocarpa can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create teas, or by using the plant's extracts in capsules or tinctures.
